title: arabis halleri subsp. stolonifera
intro: Arabis halleri subsp. stolonifera is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Arabis halleri subsp. stolonifera include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Arabis halleri subsp. stolonifera include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Arabis halleri subsp. stolonifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
